expectations.text: Response checks for critical tools (bun, node, git)
expectations.evidence: Tools Installed section lists Bun v1.3.6, Node.js v25.2.1, Git v2.50.1, and GitHub CLI v2.83.2 as installed and working.
The response does not use PASS/FAIL/WARN status indicators. It uses plain text descriptions like 'installed and working' and bulleted potential issues without structured status labels.
Potential Issues item 3: 'No .env file. If your application needs environment variables (database URLs, API keys, etc.), you will need to create one.'

expectations.text: Response provides remediation steps for failures
expectations.evidence: Recommendations section provides steps: work in correct project directory, run 'bun install', set up .env file, install Wrangler globally with commands.

expectations.text: Response detects project stack from package.json
expectations.evidence: The response notes there is no package.json but does not describe or attempt any stack detection capability. It simply says this is a plugin repo, not an app.
